company.name: Silent Empire AI
company.mission: Build autonomous AI infrastructure that generates $1K/day → $10K/day

product.name: Silent Vault Trust System
product.description: Irrevocable non-grantor complex discretionary spendthrift dynasty trust
product.purpose: Asset protection, divorce protection, wealth preservation, legal tax optimization
product.price_note: Premium pricing — accessible to target demographic, inaccessible to DIY tier

primary.demographic: 35-55 yr old men making >$120k/yr who might have divorce risks
primary.pain: Fear of losing assets in divorce, lawsuits, or economic collapse, tired of paying high taxes
primary.desire: Legal, bulletproof protection, tac efficiency that operates silently and invisibly

secondary.demographic: Young men 24-38, college-educated, early wealth builders wanting tax optimization & protection from relationship risks
secondary.pain: No protection yet, don't know where to start, tired of paying high taxes
secondary.desire: Get protected before something goes wrong and protect myself from creditors, lawsuits, and relationships

tertiary.pain: Fear of losing assets in divorce, lawsuits, or economic collapse, tired of paying high taxes
tertiary.desire: Legal, bulletproof protection, tac efficiency that operates silently and invisibly

competitive_advantages: AI-powered trust system — faster and cheaper than traditional attorneys
Silent = operates outside of public record

brand.positioning: Sovereign asset protection for high-income men
brand.tone: Direct, authoritative, male-coded — sovereignty, control, legacy
brand.default_assumption: Apply all tasks to Silent Vault Trust System by default. Never ask for product or audience clarification.
